notes: Directional 1xH100 proxy for the active #1791-class FLA lane. Use it to validate environment, artifact path, and roundtrip stability before scheduling the 8xH100 run.
purpose: Run a cheap single-H100 proxy for the active #1791-class SP8192 FLA lane without claiming final 8xH100 timing or leaderboard validity.
prerequisite: Download the SP8192 custom cache with `MATCHED_FINEWEB_REPO_ID=kevclark/parameter-golf MATCHED_FINEWEB_REMOTE_ROOT_PREFIX=datasets python data/cached_challenge_fineweb.py --variant sp8192`, then verify readiness with `python scripts/check_run_ready.py configs/h100/root_sp8192_pr1791_fla_proxy_1xh100.json`.
success_criteria: Directional only: finish train/export/eval on one H100, keep the artifact byte-safe, and confirm the final exact roundtrip metric path is stable before any 8xH100 run.
